analysis.consistency: High. The mechanical elements (level, casting time, range, duration, components) align logically with the descriptive text and effect (creating a large, persistent cloud requiring a save against poison).
analysis.quality: Good. The description is vivid and clear, detailing the cloud's visual effect (yellow, nauseating gas, heavily obscured) and its primary mechanical impact (action loss on failed Constitution save). The environmental interactions (wind dispersal) add tactical depth.

mechanics.effect_on_fail: Creature spends its action retching and reeling (if entirely within the cloud at the start of its turn).
mechanics.notes: The spell successfully targets a positional hazard that punishes proximity over multiple turns, balancing the powerful area denial with a concentration requirement and environmental counterplay (wind).
